label: alkaliphilic
notes: ✅ Term exists as METPO:1003002 with primary label "alkaphilic" (non-standard spelling). Has "alkaliphilic" as exact synonym. This was a false positive gap - no term proposal needed.

label: has growth organic acid observation
notes: Predicate for growth with organic acids like sodium lactate at specific concentrations. Similar pattern to existing has growth NaCl observation (2000508).

label: non-pigmented
notes: Companion negative term for pigmentation classes (1003022-1003031). Low utility as most observations are negative assertions which add limited value to KG.
